clues.clue: This planet has the longest sidereal rotation period and spins retrograde.
Ganymede, the largest moon in the solar system, orbits this planet.
This ice giant rotates almost on its side, with an axial tilt near 98 degrees.
Olympus Mons, the tallest known volcano in the solar system, rises on this planet.
Predicted mathematically before being seen, this planet was discovered in 1846.
Robin Williams improvised much of this wish-granting character's dialogue in a 1992 film.
Voiced by Josh Gad, this 'Frozen' snowman dreams of experiencing summer.
In 'The Lion King,' name the wisecracking meerkat who sings 'Hakuna Matata.'
David Ogden Stiers voiced this fussy mantel-clock majordomo in 'Beauty and the Beast.'
Danny DeVito voiced this satyr trainer of heroes in Disney's 'Hercules.'
This striped tiger has fronted Frosted Flakes since 1952, joined in ads by his son Tony Jr.
The Lucky Charms leprechaun's catchphrase calls the cereal 'magically' this.
This cereal captain's lore-given full name is Horatio Magellan, plus this surname.
The eternally denied Trix rabbit gag dates to the cereal's debut in this decade.
Toucan Sam of Froot Loops was originally voiced by this Looney Tunes 'Man of a Thousand Voices.'
'Gone with the Wind' ends with Scarlett resolving that tomorrow is this.
'Casablanca' closes with Rick speaking the 'beautiful friendship' line to this police captain.
'2001: A Space Odyssey' has this rogue computer plead and sing as it is shut down.
'Some Like It Hot' ends with the deadpan line 'Well, nobody's' this.
Roman Polanski's 1974 noir closes with the line 'Forget it, Jake. It's' this Los Angeles district.
'The Sixth Sense' reveals Malcolm Crowe has been in this state for most of the film.
'Fight Club' reveals the narrator and Tyler Durden are actually this.
The 1968 'Planet of the Apes' ends at the ruins of this monument on a beach.
clues.response: What is the Statue of Liberty?

clues.clue: 'The Empire Strikes Back' reveals this character is Luke's father.
'The Usual Suspects' reveals meek Verbal Kint to be this elusive mastermind.

final.clue: This comedian voiced both Donkey in 'Shrek' and Mushu in Disney's 'Mulan.'
